summary: Stop Delete Feature Testing Complete. All requirements verified: Delete button in Stop Details modal (testID: stop-delete-button), immediate deletion without confirmation, backend reindexing, and frontend stop count updates correctly.

minor.issue: Some gaps exist in stop ordering from previous operations, but new deletions correctly trigger reindex

issues: useNativeDriver not supported warning (cosmetic, JS fallback used)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend DELETE /api/stops/{stop_id} (server.py lines 645-672): Correctly deletes stop and reindexes remaining stops with bulk_write for efficiency
Frontend handleDeleteSelectedStop (index.tsx lines 1590-1636): Correctly calls deleteStop from store, handles navigation mode, refreshes stops list
Delete button in modal (index.tsx lines 2174-2188): Has testID='stop-delete-button', red styling, trash icon
Frontend deleteStop in stopsStore.ts (lines 183-195): Correctly calls DELETE API and removes stop from local state
Immediate deletion without confirmation implemented per requirements (2b)
seed_data_creation: Test stops created with TEST_DELETE_ and TEST_REINDEX_ prefixes during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delete button feature fully tested and working. The button is in the Stop Details modal, triggers immediate deletion without confirmation, backend reindexes remaining stops, and the stop count in UI updates correctly. TestID is 'stop-delete-button'.

feature_checklist.delete_button_in_stop_details_modal: PASS - testID='stop-delete-button' present, red button with trash icon
feature_checklist.immediate_deletion_no_confirmation: PASS - No confirmation dialog, deletion happens immediately
feature_checklist.stop_removed_from_backend: PASS - DELETE /api/stops/{stop_id} returns 200 and removes stop
feature_checklist.stop_removed_from_list: PASS - Stop count decreases, stop no longer visible in sidebar
feature_checklist.remaining_stops_reindexed: PASS - Backend reindexes via bulk_write after deletion
feature_checklist.delete_during_navigation_handled: PASS - Code handles navigation mode: rebuilds route, resets leg index, speaks confirmation

test_evidence.backend_tests: 7/7 passed - test_health_check, test_create_stop_for_delete, test_delete_stop_immediate, test_delete_nonexistent_stop_returns_404, test_reindex_after_delete, test_delete_all_stops_endpoint, test_delete_returns_remaining_count
test_evidence.ui_tests: Modal opens on stop click, Delete button visible and clickable, stop count decreased from 164 to 163 after deletion, no confirmation dialog appeared
